title: Happy Ghast Inventory
description: Equip Happy Ghasts with chests to give them an inventory.
body:
![HappyGhastInventoryMailLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0061f5319a7d1902b516aa531cd7a44033a6fa96.png)
---
Equip a Happy Ghast with a chest to unlock its inventory. Each additional chest increases the available storage space, up to a maximum of 6 upgrades.

Simply sneak and right-click a Happy Ghast with a chest to upgrade it.

As you upgrade it, the Happy Ghast also gains a new visual design with attached chests.


<details>
<summary>See for yourself!</summary>

![Happy Ghast with Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f52cfea63e1d6735b12c731c001b0495d87a0aa3_0.webp)
![Happy Ghast Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cc52d45afdacb29ef7a68719815ecca8f84756e_0.webp)
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ed70b4af7b29a81076a03ec97257f2d3ea22dd.png)

</details>
